RT @OwidiOdoyo: UDA has won every parliamentary by-election since Gachagua was dismissed. Today, however, the Mt. Kenya mafia and their loyalists are behaving as though Olkalou is a representative random sample of the entire country. During Moi’s era, KANU never won a by-election in Nyanza or Central, yet Moi still completed his two terms after the term-limit provision. Under Kibaki and Uhuru, the ruling parties also never won by-elections in Nyanza, but they still secured second terms. For a ruling party to lose in an opposition stronghold is perfectly normal. That UDA won in Mbere only shows that Mbere is not an opposition stronghold. Going forward, I am certain that the united opposition—led by Reckless Media Services, KTNSubstandard, RiggyG, and Orengo—will hold seven press conferences a week to remind Kenyans that Olkalou represents the whole of Kenya, and therefore Ruto must go.

WAKE UP CALL AND REMINDER TO THE U.S ON ERDOGAN’S LONG PATTERN OF ANTI-AMERICAN RHETORIC🚨 Here’s a short chronological roundup of Erdogan’s own statements attacking America and its interests. These show a consistent pattern from a so called NATO “ally”: JANUARY 9, 2018: “Those (US) who could not succeed in the military coup attempt in Turkey on July 15, 2016 are now searching for a different attempt in our country” - Erdogan JANUARY 15, 2018: “The US is insisting on forming a terror army on our borders. What can that terror army target but Turkey? Our mission is to strangle it before it's even born” - Erdogan AUGUST 23, 2018: President Recep Tayyip Erdogan has called for a boycott of iPhones along with other American technology as he whips up anti-US sentiment in increasingly bellicose nationalist speeches FEBRUARY 28, 2026: “The US and Israeli attacks on Iran are a clear violation of Iran’s sovereignty” - Erdogan President Trump criticized NATO members for not helping the US but forgot that Turkey who he is praising, prohibited USAF missions to use incirlik and Turkish airspace. Mr President, this is not isolated, it’s a pattern of hostility, double standards and scapegoating America while Turkey pursues its own agenda. Turkey under Erdogan has repeatedly tested US resolve. Time to hold “allies” accountable and put America First, the world is watching Mr @realDonaldTrump
